ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant's education level */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant's occupation */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the participant */,
  "number_of_previous_marriages" INTEGER /* Number of previous marriages */,
  "number_of_previous_partners" INTEGER /* Number of previous partners */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_education_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_level_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant in the relationship */,
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the partner in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of relationship */,
  "length_of_marriage" REAL /* Length of the marriage in years */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children in the relationship */,
  "cohabitation_status" TEXT /* Cohabitation status of the couple */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_relationship_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_type_id") REFERENCES relationship_types ("relationship_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_partner_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who completed the survey */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was completed */,
  "rate_marriage" INTEGER /* Participant's rating of their marriage (1-5) */,
  "religious" INTEGER /* Participant's level of religiousness (1-5) */,
  "affairs" REAL /* Participant's reported number of affairs */,
  "communication" INTEGER /* Participant's rating of communication (1-5) */,
  "conflict_resolution" INTEGER /* Participant's rating of conflict resolution (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who was interviewed */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date the interview took place */,
  "interviewer" TEXT /* Name of the interviewer */,
  "interview_duration" REAL /* Duration of the interview in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who was observed */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date the observation took place */,
  "observer" TEXT /* Name of the observer */,
  "observation_duration" REAL /* Duration of the observation in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, therapist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationship_types" (
  "relationship_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship type */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Name of the relationship type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who answered the question */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question answered */,
  "answer_date" TEXT /* Date the answer was provided */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_answers_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interview_transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interview the transcript is from */,
  "transcript_date" TEXT /* Date the transcript was created */,
  "transcript" TEXT /* Text of the transcript */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interview_transcripts_interview_id FOREIGN KEY ("interview_id") REFERENCES interviews ("interview_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the note is from */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_notes_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is a member of */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
